title: Waymo 开设 Ojai 机器人出租车来挑选乘客，因为该公司旨在降低车队扩张成本
summary: Alphabet's Waymo is adding new vehicles to its fleet of public robotaxis and is opening up its roomier Ojai vehicles to some riders.（原题：Waymo opens Ojai robotaxis to select riders as company aims to lower cost of fleet expansion）

title: Waymo 将部署由 Zeekr 打造的 Robotaxi 以扩大公共乘车范围
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Waymo unit will deploy a new autonomous vehicle designed specifically for robotaxi use, offering public rides in California and Arizona without human supervision.（原题：Waymo to Deploy Robotaxi Built With Zeekr to Expand Public Rides）

title: Waymo 全新 Ojai 机器人出租车将开始载客
summary: After several months of testing, Waymo is finally ready to invite non-employee passengers into its newest vehicle, the Zeekr RT minivan, which has been rebranded as Ojai. Waymo says it will begin offering "select riders" access in San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Phoenix, before "gradually" expanding to more riders and cities. Trips will be free […]（原题：Waymo to begin passenger rides in its new Ojai robotaxi）
